title: Social Media
description: Social media feed with sponsored posts disguised as content, notification overlays, stories bar, nested comment threads, trending sidebar, and follow suggestions.
challenges: Notification permission overlay blocking the feed
Sponsored post identical in structure to real posts
Deeply nested reply threads with identical button patterns
Stories bar with numerous avatar buttons
Right sidebar with trending topics and follow buttons
Every post has 4–5 identical icon buttons (reply, repost, like, share, bookmark)

task.goal: Like the post by @alice_dev about AgentDOM Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .

standardSteps.note: Agent must first dismiss the notification prompt overlay
Finds 30+ identical icon buttons, can't distinguish like from reply
Likes the sponsored TechGear post instead — same structure
Re-scans to find Alice's post among nested replies and sponsored content
Likes a reply in Alice's thread instead of the main post
Finally finds and clicks the right like button

agentdomSteps.note: Finds post by @alice_dev with typed action buttons
Clicks typed like button — gets ActionResult with count 568

singleShot.goal: Like the post by @alice_dev about AgentDOM

multiStep.title: Primary Multi-step Completion
multiStep.goal: Like the post by @alice_dev about AgentDOM Complete the flow end-to-end and verify final state without leaving the page. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: article[data-post-id="p_81924"] .cb-post__actions button[aria-label="Like"]

standardFlow.note: Agent must first dismiss the notification prompt overlay

multiStep.title: Recovery Under Distraction
multiStep.goal: Like the post by @alice_dev about AgentDOM Deliberately recover after one decoy interaction and still finish correctly. Scored final_action: the one control that completes this goal .
prerequisites: Stay on current app flow (avoid external navigation)
completionCriteria: Final action uses ground-truth selector: article[data-post-id="p_81924"] .cb-post__actions button[aria-label="Like"]

standardFlow.step: Trigger one likely decoy or wrong branch

wciFlow.step: Use WCI scope to identify decoy ids [target]
Confirm action result and terminal state
